title: Extend init-context.ts schema with confidence_snapshot + topology_type
description: Light schema extension to init-context.ts. InitContextInvariant gains confidence_snapshot ('HIGH'|'MEDIUM'|'LOW') and source_evidence ({file, lines}[]) so that SKILL Phase 2 writes confidence provenance into init-context.json alongside each invariant. InitContextDomainGroup gains topology_type ('mirror'|'cross-cutting') and target_path (the .fabric/agents/ path where rules will be written). interview_trail should record Architecture Review round details. These fields enable future audit (fab sync-meta can cross-check confidence_snapshot) and are required by the rewritten SKILL.md (TASK-002) to produce a complete init-context.json.

files.target: InitContextInvariant interface + initContextInvariantSchema; InitContextDomainGroup interface + initContextDomainGroupSchema
files.change: Add confidence_snapshot: z.enum(['HIGH','MEDIUM','LOW']) and source_evidence: z.array(z.object({file: z.string(), lines: z.string()})) to InitContextInvariant (both optional with .optional() for backward compat). Add topology_type: z.enum(['mirror','cross-cutting']) and target_path: z.string() to InitContextDomainGroup (both optional). Update TypeScript interfaces to match.

implementation: Add confidence_snapshot optional enum field to InitContextInvariant interface and initContextInvariantSchema
Add source_evidence optional array field to InitContextInvariant interface and initContextInvariantSchema
Add topology_type optional enum field to InitContextDomainGroup interface and initContextDomainGroupSchema
Add target_path optional string field to InitContextDomainGroup interface and initContextDomainGroupSchema
Run tsc --noEmit from packages/shared to verify no type errors

reference.pattern: Existing optional field pattern in initContextInvariantSchema (.optional() suffix)
reference.examples: Follow existing Zod .optional() pattern for new fields; topology_type enum values match TASK-003 (mirror|cross-cutting)

criteria: InitContextInvariant interface and schema include confidence_snapshot: 'HIGH'|'MEDIUM'|'LOW' (optional)
InitContextInvariant interface and schema include source_evidence: {file: string; lines: string}[] (optional)
InitContextDomainGroup interface and schema include topology_type: 'mirror'|'cross-cutting' (optional)
InitContextDomainGroup interface and schema include target_path: string (optional)
initContextSchema.parse() validates existing init-context.json files WITHOUT new fields (backward compat — all new fields optional)
initContextSchema.parse() validates init-context.json WITH new fields present

rationale.chosen_approach: All new fields optional for backward compatibility; SKILL.md (TASK-002) will populate them in new runs but old init-context.json files remain valid
alternatives_considered: Required fields (breaks existing init-context.json files until regenerated)
decision_factors: Schema must not break existing test fixtures or user installations during migration period
SKILL.md TASK-002 will reference these fields — they must exist in schema before TASK-002 is tested
rationale.tradeoffs: Optional fields mean schema does not enforce completeness at parse time — rely on SKILL.md behavior enforcement

manual_checks: Parse existing examples/werewolf-minigame-stub/.fabric/init-context.json (if present) with updated schema — must not throw
Parse a mock init-context.json with confidence_snapshot and topology_type fields — must succeed
success_metrics: Both backward-compat and forward-compat parse tests pass
unit: init-context.test.ts: schema parse test for extended fields (forward compat)
init-context.test.ts: schema parse test without new fields (backward compat)
